cost_name: PEM Electrolyzer Stack — 20 MW Scale Premium — Europe 2025

context.extrapolation_method: Power law scaling: n=0.90. 20 MW benchmark derived from 100 MW IEA benchmark. 20 MW price includes small-scale premium (~+12%).

estimation.estimation_method: Extrapolated from CS-ELC-001 (IEA 100 MW PEM benchmark) using power law exponent n=0.90. Cross-validated against Puertollano GA-PR-006 (20 MW PEM, operational 2022).

confidence.rationale: Derived from Class C benchmark via scaling. Puertollano actual cost provides qualitative validation but project-specific CAPEX includes solar + battery. Downgraded per cost_confidence_framework.md extrapolation rule.

primary_drivers: Small-scale procurement penalty (fewer modules, less volume discount)
Fixed OEM overhead spread over fewer MW
Minimum engineering scope regardless of plant size

sources.title: IEA GHR 2025 — 100 MW benchmark used as scaling reference
sources.author: IEA

sources.title: Puertollano GA-PR-006 — 20 MW PEM operational data (qualitative scale validation)
sources.author: Iberdrola
